title: Loan Comparison
context: Need to borrow £3,000. Option A: Personal loan, 6.9% APR, 3 years. Option B: Credit card, 0% for 18 months then 21.9%. Option C: Overdraft, 39.9% EAR.

questions.question: Option A: total interest over 3 years (approx)?
Option B: if paid off in 18 months, total interest?
Option C: approximate interest for 1 year?
Which is cheapest if you can repay within 18 months?
